goal: Refine site UI typography and document composability primitive

summary.title: Refine site UI typography and document composability primitive
summary.what: Improved the CSS typography for Chinese fonts, added styling for inline code blocks, adjusted the color of mark tags, replaced literal backticks with code tags in the copy, added a section on composability, and removed the Codex agent constraint from the installation command.
summary.why: The user noticed the default typography felt stiff and lacked proper styling for code elements. Additionally, CXS now supports multiple agents, making the Codex constraint obsolete. Finally, emphasizing the composable nature of the tool helps users understand its Unix philosophy.
summary.user_goal: Refine site UI typography and document composability primitive

decisions.chose: Added 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', and 'Microsoft YaHei'
decisions.rationale: To provide native, smooth rendering for Chinese users on macOS and Windows.
The default yellow was too harsh against the minimal site design.
CXS skill is compatible with 60+ agents, not just Codex.
